name: marketing-suite
description: Meta-bundle: turn a working repo/app into launch assets. Bundles marketing-capture (auto-detected browser backend → framed screenshots + native-only demo GIF of the real app), marketing-copy (slogans, feature blurbs, demo script grounded in the repo), and marketing-image-ops (resize/optimize/OG-image/favicon via an adopted image MCP). Uninstall cleanly with /marketing-suite:uninstall — removes the bundle and prunes its auto-installed plugins.
